name: BRINKER INTERNATIONAL, INC
business: Brinker International owns, develops, operates and franchises the Chili's Grill & Bar and Maggiano's Little Italy restaurant brands. It offers casual dining with a focus on core menu items like burgers, fajitas, and margaritas. The company serves individual consumers and families in dining rooms, takeout, and delivery.

exposures.sentence: We own, develop, operate and franchise the Chili s Grill & Bar ( Chili s ) and Maggiano s Little Italy ( Maggiano s ) restaurant brands.
Chili s has focused on a seamless digital experience as our guests preferences and expectations around dining convenience have evolved in recent years.

We are exposed to risks related to cybersecurity and protection of confidential information, and failure to protect the integrity and security of payment card or individually identifiable information of our guests and teammates or confidential and proprietary information of the Company could damage our reputation and expose us to loss of revenues, increased costs and litigation.
We are experiencing and may continue to experience challenges in recruiting and retaining team members in various locations as we are experiencing an increasingly tight and competitive labor market.

catalysts.event: Company-owned Chili's restaurants: 7 projected openings in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: Fiscal 2025 Fiscal 2026 Fiscal Year Openings Projected Openings Chili s domestic 5 7

catalysts.event: Franchise-operated restaurants: total 26-32 projected openings in fiscal 2026
Relocation of one Maggiano's restaurant in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: The Company plans to relocate one Maggiano's in fiscal 2026.
